info.name: Visual-Tube
info.description:
# Visual-Tube Backend API

A RESTful backend inspired by YouTube, built with **Node.js**, **Express.js**, and **MongoDB**.

## Features

- JWT Authentication
    
- Video Uploads (Cloudinary)
    
- Personalized Video Feed
    
- Full-text Search
    
- Playlists
    
- Comments
    
- Likes
    
- Channel Subscriptions
    
- Watch History
    
- Aggregation Pipelines
    
- Pagination
    

## Authentication

Most endpoints require a Bearer Token.

```
Authorization: Bearer <access_token>

 ```

## Base URL

```
http://localhost:8000/api/v1

 ```

This collection is organized into feature-based folders to simplify frontend integration and API testing.

item.name: user

request.description:
# Register User

## Endpoint

POST /api/v1/user/register

## Authentication

❌ Not Required

---

## Purpose

Creates a new user account and uploads avatar/cover image to Cloudinary.

---

## Request Body

Content-Type: multipart/form-data

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| fullName | string | ✅ | User's full name |
| username | string | ✅ | Must be unique |
| email | string | ✅ | Must be unique |
| password | string | ✅ | User password |
| avatar | file | ✅ | Profile image |
| coverImage | file | ❌ | Cover image |

---

## Success Response

Status: **201 Created**

``` json
{
    "statusCode": 201,
    "data": {
        "_id": "...",
        "fullName": "...",
        "username": "...",
        "email": "...",
        "avatar": "...",
        "coverImage": "..."
    },
    "message": "User registered successfully",
    "success": true
}

 ```

---

## Error Responses

**400**

- Missing required fields
    
- Username already exists
    
- Email already exists
    

---

## Frontend Notes

- Submit using **multipart/form-data**.
    
- Avatar is mandatory.
    
- Redirect to Login page after successful registration.

# Login

## Endpoint

POST /api/v1/user/login

## Authentication

❌ Not Required

---

## Purpose

Authenticates user and returns Access Token & Refresh Token.

---

## Request Body

Content-Type: application/json

| Field | Type | Required |
| --- | --- | --- |
| email | string | Either email or username |
| username | string | Either username or email |
| password | string | ✅ |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

``` json
{
    "statusCode":200,
    "data":{
        "user":{},
        "accessToken":"...",
        "refreshToken":"..."
    },
    "message":"Logged in successfully",
    "success":true
}

 ```

---

## Error Responses

400

- Missing credentials
    
- Invalid password
    

404

- User not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

- Store Access Token securely.
    
- Refresh Token is handled automatically by backend.
    
- Redirect to Home page after login.

# Logout

## Endpoint

POST /api/v1/user/logout

## Authentication

✅ Required

Bearer Token

---

## Purpose

Logs out current user and clears refresh token.

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

``` json
{
    "statusCode":200,
    "message":"Logged out successfully",
    "success":true
}

 ```

---

## Frontend Notes

- Remove stored access token.
    
- Redirect user to Login page.

# Update Account Details

## Endpoint

PATCH /api/v1/user/update-account-details

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Request Body

Content-Type: application/json

| Field | Type |
| --- | --- |
| fullName | string |
| email | string |

---

## Purpose

Updates account information.

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns updated user document.

---

## Error Responses

400

- Invalid data
    

404

- User not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

Prefill existing values before editing.

# Update Avatar

## Endpoint

PATCH /api/v1/user/update-avatar

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Request Body

Content-Type: multipart/form-data

| Field | Type |
| --- | --- |
| avatar | file |

---

## Purpose

Uploads a new avatar image.

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns updated avatar URL.

---

## Frontend Notes

Image preview is recommended before upload.

# Update Cover Image

## Endpoint

PATCH /api/v1/user/update-coverimage

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Request Body

Content-Type: multipart/form-data

| Field | Type |
| --- | --- |
| coverImage | file |

---

## Purpose

Updates user's cover image.

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns updated cover image URL.

---

## Frontend Notes

Upload using multipart/form-data.

# Get Current User

## Endpoint

POST /api/v1/user/get-user

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Returns currently logged-in user's profile.

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns authenticated user's information.

---

## Frontend Notes

Use when application loads after authentication.

# Get User Channel Profile

## Endpoint

GET /api/v1/user/c/:username

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| username | string |

---

## Purpose

Returns public channel profile.

Includes:

- Channel information
    
- Subscriber count
    
- Subscribed count
    
- Is current user subscribed
    

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns channel profile object.

---

## Frontend Notes

Use for Channel page.

# Get Watch History

## Endpoint

GET /api/v1/user/history

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Returns authenticated user's watch history.

Videos are ordered from most recently watched to oldest.

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns array of watched videos.

---

## Frontend Notes

Display using horizontal scrolling or History page.

# Regenerate Access Token

## Endpoint

POST /api/v1/user/regenerate-tokens

## Authentication

❌ Uses Refresh Token

---

## Purpose

Generates a new Access Token using Refresh Token.

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns:

- new access token
    
- new refresh token
    

---

## Frontend Notes

Call automatically when receiving **401 Unauthorized** due to expired access token.

item.description:
# Authentication & User APIs

Handles user authentication and account management.

Includes:

- Token Regeneration
    
- Update Account Details

- Get Current User
    
- Get Channel Profile

item.name: video

formdata.value: mongodb introduction with project set up and creating first mongodb query

request.description:
# Upload Video

## Endpoint

POST /api/v1/video

## Authentication

✅ Required (Bearer Token)

---

## Purpose

Uploads a new video along with its thumbnail. The authenticated user becomes the owner of the uploaded video.

---

## Request Body

Content-Type: multipart/form-data

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| title | string | ✅ | Video title |
| description | string | ✅ | Video description |
| tags | string | ✅ | Comma-separated tags (e.g. mongodb,nodejs,backend) |
| isPublished | boolean | ❌ | Defaults to false if omitted |
| video | file | ✅ | Video file |
| thumbnail | file | ✅ | Thumbnail image |

---

## Success Response

Status: **201 Created**

``` json
{
    "statusCode":201,
    "data":{
        "_id":"...",
        "title":"...",
        "owner":"..."
    },
    "message":"Video uploaded successfully",
    "success":true
}

 ```

---

## Error Responses

400

- Required fields missing
    
- Invalid file
    

404

- User not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

- Send request as **multipart/form-data**.
    
- Tags must be sent as a comma-separated string.
    
- Do not wrap strings inside quotes (`"title"`).
    
- After successful upload, redirect to the uploaded video's page.

# Get Video By ID

## Endpoint

GET /api/v1/video/:videoId

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Returns complete information about a single video.

The response includes:

- Video details
    
- Owner information
    
- Like count
    
- Subscription information
    
- Whether current user liked the video
    
- Whether current user subscribed to the channel
    

---

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| videoId | ObjectId |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns complete video object.

---

## Error Responses

400

- Invalid videoId
    

404

- Video not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

Use this endpoint when opening the Watch page.

# Watch Video

## Endpoint

POST /api/v1/video/:videoId/watch

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Registers a video watch.

This endpoint:

- increments view count
    
- updates user's watch history
    

---

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| videoId | ObjectId |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns updated video view count.

---

## Error Responses

400

- Invalid videoId
    

404

- Video not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

**Do NOT call immediately when opening the Watch page.**

Wait until:

- playback has started
    
- approximately **15–20 seconds** have elapsed
    

Only then call this endpoint.

# Update Thumbnail

## Endpoint

PATCH /api/v1/video/:videoId/change-avatar

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Updates video thumbnail.

Only the owner can perform this operation.

---

## Request Body

Content-Type: multipart/form-data

| Field | Type |
| --- | --- |
| thumbnail | file |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns updated thumbnail URL.

---

## Frontend Notes

Display image preview before uploading.

# Update Video Details

## Endpoint

PATCH /api/v1/video/:videoId

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Updates video's metadata.

Only the owner can update.

---

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| videoId | ObjectId |

---

## Request Body

Content-Type: application/json

| Field | Type |
| --- | --- |
| title | string |
| description | string |
| tags | array |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns updated video.

---

## Error Responses

400

- Invalid request
    

404

- Video not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

Only show Edit option for the video owner.

# Toggle Publish Status

## Endpoint

PATCH /api/v1/video/:videoId/publish

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Toggles video visibility between:

- Published
    
- Private
    

Only the owner can perform this operation.

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns updated publish status.

---

## Frontend Notes

Ideal for a Publish/Unpublish switch in Creator Studio.

# Delete Video

## Endpoint

DELETE /api/v1/video/:videoId

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Deletes a video permanently.

Associated Cloudinary media is also removed.

Only the owner can delete.

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns deletion confirmation.

---

## Error Responses

404

- Video not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

Always show a confirmation dialog before deleting.

# Get Video Feed

## Endpoint

GET /api/v1/video/get-feed

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Returns the public video feed.

Supports:

- Latest videos
    
- Trending videos
    
- Full-text search
    
- Pagination
    

---

## Query Parameters

| Name | Type | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| page | number | 1 |
| limit | number | 10 |
| search | string | "" |
| mode | string | latest |

mode values:

- latest
    
- trending
    

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns:

- totalVideos
    
- paginated videos
    

---

## Frontend Notes

Supports infinite scrolling.

Search uses MongoDB Text Index.

# Personalized Feed

## Endpoint

GET /api/v1/video/personalised

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Returns recommended videos.

Recommendations are generated using:

- Watch history
    
- Previously watched tags
    
- Excludes already watched videos
    

---

## Query Parameters

| Name | Type | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| page | number | 1 |
| limit | number | 10 |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns paginated recommended videos.

---

## Frontend Notes

Use for the Home page after user login.

# Get Video Likes

## Endpoint

GET /api/v1/video/:videoId/likes

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Returns users who liked the specified video.

---

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| videoId | ObjectId |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns:

- Total likes
    
- User information of each liker
    

---

## Error Responses

400

- Invalid videoId
    

404

- Video not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

Useful for a "Liked By" modal or analytics page. The watch page itself can rely on the `likeCount` returned by **Get Video By ID** instead of calling this endpoint separately.

item.description:
# Video APIs

Handles all video-related operations.

Includes:

- Upload Video
    
- Watch Video
    
- Get Video By ID
    
- Update Video Details
    
- Update Thumbnail
    
- Toggle Publish Status
    
- Delete Video
    
- Video Feed
    
- Personalized Feed
    
- Video Likes

item.name: comment

request.description:
# Get Video Comments

## Endpoint

GET /api/v1/comment/video/:videoId

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Returns all comments for a video.

Each comment includes:

- Comment content
    
- Comment owner details
    
- Like count
    
- Whether the current user has liked the comment
    

---

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| videoId | ObjectId |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns an array of comments.

---

## Error Responses

400

- Invalid videoId
    

404

- Video not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

Display comments sorted from newest to oldest.

Supports rendering Like button using the returned `isLiked` field.

# Add Comment

## Endpoint

POST /api/v1/comment/video/:videoId

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Adds a new comment to the specified video.

---

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| videoId | ObjectId |

---

## Request Body

Content-Type: application/json

| Field | Type | Required |
| --- | --- | --- |
| content | string | ✅ |

---

## Success Response

Status: **201 Created**

Returns the newly created comment.

---

## Error Responses

400

- Empty comment
    
- Invalid videoId
    

404

- Video not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

After successful creation, prepend the returned comment to the existing comment list instead of re-fetching all comments.

# Edit Comment

## Endpoint

PATCH /api/v1/comment/:commentId

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Updates an existing comment.

Only the comment owner can edit.

---

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| commentId | ObjectId |

---

## Request Body

Content-Type: application/json

| Field | Type |
| --- | --- |
| content | string |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns the updated comment.

---

## Error Responses

400

- Empty content
    
- Invalid commentId
    

404

- Comment not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

Show the Edit option only for comments created by the authenticated user.

# Delete Comment

## Endpoint

DELETE /api/v1/comment/:commentId

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Deletes a comment.

Only the comment owner can delete.

---

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| commentId | ObjectId |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns a confirmation message.

---

## Error Responses

400

- Invalid commentId
    

404

- Comment not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

Display a confirmation dialog before deletion.

On success, remove the comment from the UI without making another API request.

item.description:
# Comment APIs

Handles video comments.

Includes:

- Add Comment
    
- Edit Comment
    
- Delete Comment
    
- Get Video Comments

item.name: subscription

request.description:
# Get Subscribed Channels

## Endpoint

GET /api/v1/subscription

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Returns all channels subscribed to by the authenticated user.

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns an array containing:

- Channel ID
    
- Username
    
- Avatar
    
- Subscriber count
    

---

## Error Responses

404

- User not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

Use this endpoint to display the **Subscriptions** page or sidebar.

# Toggle Subscribe

## Endpoint

POST /api/v1/subscription/:channelId

## Authentication

✅ Required (Bearer Token)

---

## Purpose

Subscribes or unsubscribes the authenticated user from a channel.

If the user is not subscribed, a new subscription is created.

If already subscribed, the subscription is removed.

---

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| channelId | ObjectId | Channel owner's user ID |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

``` json
{
    "statusCode":200,
    "data":{
        "isSubscribed":true
    },
    "message":"Subscribed successfully",
    "success":true
}

 ```

or

``` json
{
    "statusCode":200,
    "data":{
        "isSubscribed":false
    },
    "message":"Unsubscribed successfully",
    "success":true
}

 ```

---

## Error Responses

400

- Invalid channelId
    
- Cannot subscribe to yourself
    

404

- Channel not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

- Update Subscribe button immediately using the returned `isSubscribed` value.
    
- No need to make another API call after toggling.

item.description:
# Subscription APIs

Manages channel subscriptions.

Includes:

- Subscribe / Unsubscribe Channel
    
- Get Subscribed Channels

item.name: like

request.description:
# Toggle Video Like

## Endpoint

POST /api/v1/like/video/:videoId

## Authentication

✅ Required (Bearer Token)

---

## Purpose

Likes or unlikes a video.

If the authenticated user has not liked the video, a new like is created.

If already liked, the like is removed.

---

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| videoId | ObjectId |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

``` json
{
    "statusCode":200,
    "data":{
        "isLiked":true
    },
    "message":"Video liked successfully",
    "success":true
}

 ```

or

``` json
{
    "statusCode":200,
    "data":{
        "isLiked":false
    },
    "message":"Video unliked successfully",
    "success":true
}

 ```

---

## Error Responses

400

- Invalid videoId
    

404

- Video not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

- Update the Like button using the returned `isLiked` value.
    
- Adjust the displayed like count without making another API request.

# Toggle Comment Like

## Endpoint

POST /api/v1/like/comment/:commentId

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Likes or unlikes a comment.

Only one like per user per comment is allowed.

---

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| commentId | ObjectId |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

``` json
{
    "statusCode":200,
    "data":{
        "isLiked":true
    },
    "message":"Comment liked successfully",
    "success":true
}

 ```

or

``` json
{
    "statusCode":200,
    "data":{
        "isLiked":false
    },
    "message":"Comment unliked successfully",
    "success":true
}

 ```

---

## Error Responses

400

- Invalid commentId
    

404

- Comment not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

- Update the comment's Like button immediately using the returned `isLiked` value.
    
- Increment or decrement the displayed like count locally instead of refetching all comments.

item.description:
# Like APIs

Provides toggle-like functionality.

Supports:

- Like / Unlike Videos
    
- Like / Unlike Comments

item.name: playlist

request.description:
# Create Playlist

## Endpoint

POST /api/v1/playlist

## Authentication

✅ Required (Bearer Token)

---

## Purpose

Creates a new playlist for the authenticated user.

---

## Request Body

Content-Type: application/json

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| name | string | ✅ | Playlist name |
| description | string | ❌ | Playlist description |

---

## Success Response

Status: **201 Created**

Returns the newly created playlist.

---

## Error Responses

400

- Playlist name is required
    

---

## Frontend Notes

- Every playlist belongs to the authenticated user.
    
- Redirect to the playlist page after successful creation.

# Get All User Playlists

## Endpoint

GET /api/v1/playlist/user/:userId

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Returns all playlists created by the specified user.

---

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| userId | ObjectId |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns an array of playlists.

Each playlist contains:

- Playlist ID
    
- Name
    
- Description
    
- Thumbnail (first video's thumbnail if available)
    
- Total videos
    
- Owner information
    

---

## Error Responses

400

- Invalid userId
    

404

- User not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

Use for displaying playlists on a user's channel page.

# Get Playlist By ID

## Endpoint

GET /api/v1/playlist/:playlistId

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Returns complete playlist information.

Includes:

- Playlist details
    
- Owner details
    
- Videos in the same order they were added
    

---

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| playlistId | ObjectId |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns playlist object.

---

## Error Responses

400

- Invalid playlistId
    

404

- Playlist not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

Videos are already sorted according to the playlist order.  
No additional sorting is required on the frontend.

# Update Playlist

## Endpoint

PATCH /api/v1/playlist/:playlistId

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Updates playlist name and description.

Only the playlist owner can update.

---

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| playlistId | ObjectId |

---

## Request Body

Content-Type: application/json

| Field | Type |
| --- | --- |
| name | string |
| description | string |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns updated playlist.

---

## Error Responses

400

- Invalid playlistId
    

404

- Playlist not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

Show Edit option only to the playlist owner.

# Delete Playlist

## Endpoint

DELETE /api/v1/playlist/:playlistId

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Deletes a playlist.

Videos themselves are **not deleted**.

Only the playlist owner can delete it.

---

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| playlistId | ObjectId |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns deletion confirmation.

---

## Error Responses

400

- Invalid playlistId
    

404

- Playlist not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

Show a confirmation dialog before deleting.

# Add Video To Playlist

## Endpoint

POST /api/v1/playlist/:playlistId/video/:videoId

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Adds a video to a playlist.

A playlist can contain videos uploaded by any user.

Duplicate videos are not added.

Only the playlist owner can modify the playlist.

---

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| playlistId | ObjectId |
| videoId | ObjectId |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns updated playlist.

---

## Error Responses

400

- Invalid playlistId
    
- Invalid videoId
    
- Video already exists in playlist
    

404

- Playlist not found
    
- Video not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

Refresh the playlist after adding a video.

# Remove Video From Playlist

## Endpoint

DELETE /api/v1/playlist/:playlistId/video/:videoId

## Authentication

✅ Required

---

## Purpose

Removes a video from a playlist.

Only the playlist owner can perform this operation.

---

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| playlistId | ObjectId |
| videoId | ObjectId |

---

## Success Response

Status: **200 OK**

Returns updated playlist.

---

## Error Responses

400

- Invalid playlistId
    
- Invalid videoId
    

404

- Playlist not found
    
- Video not found
    

---

## Frontend Notes

Remove the video from the displayed playlist immediately after a successful response.

item.description:
# Playlist APIs

Allows authenticated users to organize videos into playlists.

Includes:

- Create Playlist
    
- Update Playlist
    
- Delete Playlist
    
- Get Playlist
    
- Get User Playlists
    
- Add Video to Playlist
    
- Remove Video from Playlist
